results.title: Hawaii Children’s Theatre announces summer lineup
results.description: LIHUE — The Hawaii Children’s Theatre announced on Tuesday its summer lineup of performances that feature talented youth performers, alumni artists and emerging theatre professionals. The post Hawaii Children’s Theatre announces summer lineup appeared first on The Garden Island .

results.description: We're mixing it up with a six-letter word today. Good luck!

results.title: Sharpsburg selects new garbage hauler for next year, bills to decrease
results.description: Sharpsburg residents will see their garbage bills decrease next year as the borough recently approved a five-year contract with a new hauler.

results.title: Everblades defeat Mavericks 2-1 in overtime to win Game 3 of Kelly Cup Finals
results.description: Despite having trailed for the entirety of the Kelly Cup Finals, the Florida Everblades were able to tie things up late in Game 3 of the series and eventually seal the win in overtime.

results.title: Murrysville prepares for summer paving program
results.description: Murrysville public works crews are finishing up preparation work as the municipality’s summer paving program gets underway.

results.title: Editorial: Dr. Chatbot will see you now
results.description: Doctors go to school for a long time. They spend four years in college and four more in medical school. That’s followed by as many as seven years in residency programs. There can be more training for fellowships and board certifications in specific specialties.

results.title: Newly retired North Allegheny superintendent lauded at final school board meeting
results.description: In his three years as superintendent of the North Allegheny School District, Brendan Hyland implemented the 2024-29 data-driven strategic and comprehensive plan, spearheaded the creation of the North Allegheny Police Department and helped kick off a major renovation of five schools.

results.title: U mad, bro?: Fans call for Paul Skenes trade, get extreme about Nick Herbig contract
results.description: For a quiet week in the middle of June, there was certainly a ton of material for “U mad, bro?”

results.title: Governor’s VIP Airport Lounge: See Inside The Guest Book
results.description: The exclusive lounge is a quaint reminder of an era when Hawaiʻi air travel was the epitome of glamour.

results.title: On Sports: Several MLB mock drafts agree on Pirates 1st-round projection
results.description: Welcome to Thursday’s “On Sports,” pinch-hitting once again for “First Call.” Today, there’s an interesting correlation in several 2026 mock drafts concerning the Pirates’ first-round selection. Plus, Penguins goalie prospect Sergei Murashov earned some AHL-wide respect. Former Steelers wideout Brandon Johnson found a new home shortly after being waived, while Pitt’s recently decommitted quarterback recruit promptly chose a new suitor.

results.title: Undefeated North Allegheny to try for 10th PIAA boys volleyball title
results.description: The North Allegheny boys volleyball program has won 24 WPIAL championships, 11 more than any other active school. Now turning their attention to the PIAA Class 3A championship, the Tigers seek one for the other thumb.

results.title: Penguins A to Z: Tommy Novak is now much more of a proven commodity
results.description: With the Pittsburgh Penguins entering the offseason after a brief return to the postseason, TribLive will offer Penguins A to Z, a player-by-player look at all 53 individuals signed to an NHL contract — including those whose deals do not begin until future seasons — with the organization.

results.title: Edwardsville, Glen Carbon mark summer with anniversary celebrations
results.description: Glen Carbon IL Glentennial, America 250 programs, library activities, parades, fireworks and family events fill the local summer celebration calendar.

results.title: Meet the 2026 Tri-Valley Conference Red baseball all-league teams
results.description: Freeland and Swan Valley tied for the Tri-Valley Conference Red championship.

results.title: Muhammad named athletic director at Benton Harbor schools
results.description: BENTON HARBOR — Benton Harbor Mayor Marcus Muhammad was named the new athletic director at Benton Harbor Area Schools, and is expected to start July 1.

results.title: Yamaha R9 Gets A New Colour Option In The US - Here's Why Indian Fans Will Love It
results.description: The 2027 Yamaha R9, although not available in India, has captivated local enthusiasts with its new Matte Phantom Blue/Fluo Red colour option in the US. This eye-catching hue, featuring dark blue with red accents, offers a more sporty look to the supersport.

results.title: St. Joseph Planning Commission in the midst of leadership change
results.description: ST. JOSEPH — A policy adopted this winter in St. Joseph is starting to have an impact on the boards and commissions which help the city function.

results.title: Number of measles cases in Virginia surpasses 100
results.description: There have been 106 cases of measles in Virginia this year, according to data released Tuesday from the state health department. It is likely the highest number of cases of the virus in the state in decades.

results.title: The Sunshine Blog: Montana Man Charged With Threatening Hawaiʻi Governor
results.description: Short takes, outtakes, our takes and other stuff you should know about public information, government accountability and ethical leadership in Hawai‘i.
